description: Enhance data migration capabilities with advanced features and enterprise-grade reliability

tasks.description: Ensure all post relationships and metadata links are preserved during export/import

tasks.title: Implement incremental backup system

tasks.description: Build comprehensive validation system to ensure migrated data integrity

tasks.description: Test migration system with 10,000+ posts to ensure performance and reliability

tasks.title: Version conflict resolution for collaborative environments
tasks.description: Handle conflicts when multiple users modify the same content during migration

notes: Export/import system is functional but needs enhancement for enterprise use cases
